en: I recently graduated from Northwestern University.
ko: 최근 노스웨스턴 대학교를 졸업했습니다. 그래서 여기는 왜 왔죠?

en: Well, I think I could do a good job as your assistant.
ko: 당신의 어시스턴트로 잘할 수 있을 거라고 생각해서요.

en: I came to New York to be a journalist and sent letters out everywhere and finally got a call from Elias Clark.
I met with Sherry up at Human Resources and basically it's this, our auto-universe.

ko: 기본적으로 여기 아니면 오토 유니버스예요. 그래서 런웨이를 안 읽어요?

en: And before today you had never heard of me?
ko: 그리고 오늘 전까지 저에 대해 들어본 적도 없었고요?

en: And you have no style or sense of fashion?
ko: 스타일이나 패션 감각이 전혀 없군요. 글쎄요, 음...

en: Well, um, I think that depends on what you're... No, no.
ko: 글쎄요, 그건 뭐에 따라 다르다고 생각하는데...

en: Um, I was editor-in-chief of the Daily Northwestern.
